title: Control Phase II mushroom substrate process
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Control Phase II mushroom substrate process demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Confirm the requirements for Phase II mushroom substrate preparation

pcs.text: Monitor and manage Phase II mushroom substrate process and ensure all equipment is operated safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and manage Phase II mushroom substrate process and ensure all equipment is operated safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and manage Phase II mushroom substrate process and ensure all equipment is operated safely.

pcs.text: Check and ensure all temperature probes are functioning correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and ensure all temperature probes are functioning correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and ensure all temperature probes are functioning correctly.

pcs.text: Confirm site quarantine protocols and workplace and personal hygiene requirements are followed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site quarantine protocols and workplace and personal hygiene requirements are followed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site quarantine protocols and workplace and personal hygiene requirements are followed.

pcs.text: Assess condition and quality of compost before filling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess condition and quality of compost before filling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess condition and quality of compost before filling.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm the requirements for Phase II mushroom substrate preparation

elements.title: Carry out Phase II process

pcs.text: Monitor placement of probes in air and substrate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor placement of probes in air and substrate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor placement of probes in air and substrate.

pcs.text: Check amount and evenness of filling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check amount and evenness of filling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check amount and evenness of filling.

pcs.text: Check doors are secure and vents and thermostats are set at completion of filling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check doors are secure and vents and thermostats are set at completion of filling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check doors are secure and vents and thermostats are set at completion of filling.

pcs.text: Measure and record key factors and critical points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure and record key factors and critical points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure and record key factors and critical points.

pcs.text: Adjust equipment settings to ensure optimum conditions for each Phase II sub-stage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust equipment settings to ensure optimum conditions for each Phase II sub-stage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust equipment settings to ensure optimum conditions for each Phase II sub-stage.

pcs.text: Take random representative samples for laboratory testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take random representative samples for laboratory testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take random representative samples for laboratory testing.

pcs.text: Determine ammonia levels before cool down for spawning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine ammonia levels before cool down for spawning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine ammonia levels before cool down for spawning.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out Phase II process
